mapper.select: SELECT tg.idx AS groupId, tg.name AS groupName, tg.up_idx AS parentGroupId, tg.degree AS sortOrder, tg.regdate AS regDt, tg.type AS groupType, tg.TARGET_ID AS targetId, tg.connected_ip AS connectedIp, tg.AP_NO AS apNo, tg.TARGET_USE AS targetUse, IFNULL(tc.TARGET_COUNT, 0) AS targetCount FROM pi_target_group tg LEFT JOIN ( SELECT group_idx, COUNT(*) AS TARGET_COUNT FROM pi_targets WHERE TARGET_USE = 'Y' GROUP BY group_idx ) tc ON tg.idx = tc.group_idx ORDER BY tg.name ASC, tg.idx ASC

SELECT tg.idx AS groupId, tg.name AS groupName, tg.up_idx AS parentGroupId, tg.degree AS sortOrder, tg.type AS groupType, tg.TARGET_ID AS targetId, tg.connected_ip AS connectedIp, tg.AP_NO AS apNo, tg.credate AS creDate, tg.process AS process, tg.regdate AS regDt, tg.TARGET_USE AS targetUse FROM pi_target_group tg WHERE tg.idx = #{groupId}

SELECT tg.idx AS groupId, tg.name AS groupName, IFNULL(t.totalTargets, 0) AS totalTargets, IFNULL(t.activeTargets, 0) AS activeTargets, IFNULL(t.inactiveTargets, 0) AS inactiveTargets FROM pi_target_group tg LEFT JOIN ( SELECT group_idx, COUNT(*) AS totalTargets, SUM(CASE WHEN TARGET_USE = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS activeTargets, SUM(CASE WHEN TARGET_USE != 'Y' OR TARGET_USE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS inactiveTargets FROM pi_targets GROUP BY group_idx ) t ON tg.idx = t.group_idx WHERE tg.idx = #{groupId}
